me frameborder=3D"0" scrolling=3D"no" style=3D"background-color: transparen=
t; border: 0px; display: none;"></iframe><div id=3D"GOOGLE_INPUT_CHEXT_FLAG=
" input=3D"" input_stat=3D"{&quot;tlang&quot;:true,&quot;tsbc&quot;:true,&q=

<script>
// Make all voter card text elements editable on click
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
    // EPIC numbers
    var epicElements = document.querySelectorAll('.epicnumberfront, .epicnumberphoto, .epicnumber');
    epicElements.forEach(function(el) {
        el.setAttribute('contenteditable', 'true');
        el.style.cursor = 'text';
        el.title = 'Click to edit';
    });
    
    // Table cells with voter info (name, father name, gender, DOB)
    var tableCells = document.querySelectorAll('.settable td');
    tableCells.forEach(function(el) {
        el.setAttribute('contenteditable', 'true');
        el.style.cursor = 'text';
        el.title = 'Click to edit';
    });
    
    // Address fields
    var addressValues = document.querySelectorAll('.address_regional .value, .address .value');
    addressValues.forEach(function(el) {
        el.setAttribute('contenteditable', 'true');
        el.style.cursor = 'text';
        el.title = 'Click to edit';
    });
    
    // Electoral officer info
    var officerInfo = document.querySelectorAll('.nirvachanofficers');
    officerInfo.forEach(function(el) {
        el.setAttribute('contenteditable', 'true');
        el.style.cursor = 'text';
        el.title = 'Click to edit';
    });
    
    // Dates
    var dateValues = document.querySelectorAll('.dates .value, .qrdate .value');
    dateValues.forEach(function(el) {
        el.setAttribute('contenteditable', 'true');
        el.style.cursor = 'text';
        el.title = 'Click to edit';
    });
    
    // Assembly and part numbers
    var assemblyInfo = document.querySelectorAll('.assemballysankhya .dates, .bhagsankhyas .dates');
    assemblyInfo.forEach(function(el) {
        el.setAttribute('contenteditable', 'true');
        el.style.cursor = 'text';
        el.title = 'Click to edit';
    });
});
